---
title: "Cross-Asset VRP 현황 대시보드"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
---

7개 자산군, **19개 자산**의 **변동성 리스크 프리미엄(VRP)** 현황을 제시합니다.

::: {.callout-note}
**VRP = Implied Variance - Realized Variance**

- IV 인덱스 존재 자산 (4개): VIX(SPY), VXN(QQQ), OVX(USO), GVZ(GLD)
- IV 인덱스 미존재 자산 (15개): GARCH(1,1) 조건부 변동성을 IV 프록시로 사용
:::

## 1. 최근 VRP 현황 (전 자산)

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| label: vrp-bar-chart

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.dates as mdates
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.family': 'DejaVu Sans',
    'figure.facecolor': '#0d1117',
    'axes.facecolor': '#161b22',
    'axes.edgecolor': '#30363d',
    'axes.labelcolor': '#c9d1d9',
    'text.color': '#c9d1d9',
    'xtick.color': '#8b949e',
    'ytick.color': '#8b949e',
    'grid.color': '#21262d',
    'grid.alpha': 0.6,
})

# Load data
summary = pd.read_csv('../paper/csv/vrp_summary.csv')
ts = pd.read_csv('../paper/csv/vrp_timeseries.csv', parse_dates=['Date'])

# --- Bar Chart: Latest VRP ---
summary_sorted = summary.sort_values('Recent_VRP_pct', ascending=True)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))

labels = [f"{row['Ticker']} ({row['Name']})" for _, row in summary_sorted.iterrows()]
values = summary_sorted['Recent_VRP_pct'].values
colors = ['#2ea043' if v > 0 else '#f85149' for v in values]

bars = ax.barh(range(len(labels)), values, color=colors, alpha=0.85, height=0.6)
ax.set_yticks(range(len(labels)))
ax.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=9)
ax.axvline(x=0, color='#c9d1d9', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='-')
ax.set_xlabel('VRP (%, 22-day avg)', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('Cross-Asset VRP: Latest 22-Day Average', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=12)

# Value labels
for bar, val in zip(bars, values):
    x_pos = bar.get_width()
    ha = 'left' if val >= 0 else 'right'
    offset = 0.05 if val >= 0 else -0.05
    ax.text(x_pos + offset, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,
            f'{val:+.2f}%', va='center', ha=ha, fontsize=8, color='#c9d1d9')

ax.grid(axis='x', alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## 2. 자산군별 VRP 추이

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 28
#| label: vrp-timeseries

group_order = ['Equity', 'Bond', 'Grain', 'Livestock', 'Energy', 'Metal', 'Other']
group_labels = {
    'Equity': 'Equity (주식)',
    'Bond': 'Bond (채권)',
    'Grain': 'Grain (곡물)',
    'Livestock': 'Livestock (축산물)',
    'Energy': 'Energy (에너지)',
    'Metal': 'Metal (금속)',
    'Other': 'Other (부동산/통화)',
}
group_colors = {
    'Equity': ['#58a6ff', '#79c0ff', '#a5d6ff', '#388bfd', '#1f6feb'],
    'Bond': ['#f0883e', '#d29922', '#e3b341', '#db6d28'],
    'Grain': ['#2ea043', '#3fb950', '#56d364'],
    'Livestock': ['#bc8cff'],
    'Energy': ['#f85149', '#ff7b72'],
    'Metal': ['#e3b341', '#d2a8ff'],
    'Other': ['#8b949e', '#6e7681'],
}

groups_present = [g for g in group_order if g in ts['Group'].unique()]
n_groups = len(groups_present)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(n_groups, 1, figsize=(14, 4 * n_groups))
if n_groups == 1:
    axes = [axes]

for idx, group in enumerate(groups_present):
    ax = axes[idx]
    group_data = ts[ts['Group'] == group]
    tickers = group_data['Ticker'].unique()
    colors = group_colors.get(group, ['#8b949e'] * len(tickers))
    
    for i, ticker in enumerate(tickers):
        ticker_data = group_data[group_data['Ticker'] == ticker]
        name = ticker_data['Name'].iloc[0]
        iv_type = ticker_data['IV_Type'].iloc[0]
        color = colors[i % len(colors)]
        
        ax.plot(ticker_data['Date'], ticker_data['VRP'],
                color=color, linewidth=1.2, alpha=0.9,
                label=f"{ticker} ({name}) [{iv_type}]")
    
    ax.axhline(y=0, color='#f85149', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)
    ax.set_title(group_labels.get(group, group), fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=8)
    ax.set_ylabel('VRP (%)', fontsize=9)
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    ax.xaxis.set_major_formatter(mdates.DateFormatter('%Y-%m'))
    ax.xaxis.set_major_locator(mdates.MonthLocator(interval=6))
    plt.setp(ax.xaxis.get_majorticklabels(), rotation=45)
    ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=7, framealpha=0.7,
             facecolor='#161b22', edgecolor='#30363d')
    
    # Shade negative regions for first ticker
    if len(tickers) > 0:
        first = group_data[group_data['Ticker'] == tickers[0]]
        ax.fill_between(first['Date'], 0, first['VRP'],
                       where=first['VRP'] < 0, alpha=0.08, color='#f85149')

plt.tight_layout(h_pad=3)
plt.show()
```

## 3. 자산별 VRP 요약 테이블

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: vrp-summary-table

from IPython.display import Markdown, HTML

summary_display = summary.copy()
summary_display['Signal'] = summary_display['Recent_VRP_pct'].apply(
    lambda x: 'Overpriced' if x > 0 else 'Underpriced'
)
summary_display['Current_RV_pct'] = summary_display['Current_RV_pct'].apply(lambda x: f"{x:.2f}")
summary_display['Recent_VRP_pct'] = summary_display['Recent_VRP_pct'].apply(lambda x: f"{x:+.3f}")
summary_display['Avg_VRP_pct'] = summary_display['Avg_VRP_pct'].apply(lambda x: f"{x:+.3f}")

summary_display.columns = ['Group', 'Ticker', 'Name', 'IV Source', 'Current RV(%)', 'Recent VRP(%)', 'Avg VRP(%)', 'Signal']

display(HTML(summary_display.to_html(index=False, classes='table table-striped table-sm')))

n_over = (summary['Recent_VRP_pct'] > 0).sum()
n_under = len(summary) - n_over
display(Markdown(f"\n**Overpriced (VRP > 0)**: {n_over}개 | **Underpriced (VRP < 0)**: {n_under}개"))
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## VRP 해석 가이드
- **VRP > 0 (Overpriced)**: 옵션 시장이 실현될 변동성보다 높은 프리미엄 부과 → **변동성 매도(short vol)** 전략 유리
- **VRP < 0 (Underpriced)**: 실현 변동성이 내재 변동성을 초과 → **위험 회피** 또는 **변동성 매수(long vol)** 고려
- IV Index 기반 자산(SPY, QQQ, USO, GLD)의 VRP가 가장 신뢰도 높음
- GARCH 프록시 VRP는 방향성 참고용으로 활용
:::
